data.title: Ethereum Foundation uncovers North Korean workers in crypto, revealing 100 DPRK IT employees across 53 projects.
data.description: Approximately 100 IT workers from North Korea were identified by the Ethereum Foundation through a six-month program involving 53 cryptocurrency projects.

data.title: Family Centered Treatment Foundation Partners with Arkansas DHS and OSAMH to Launch Family Centered Treatment-Recovery® in the Specialized Women's Services Program
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on April 16, 2026, the Family Centered Treatment Foundation (FCTF) revealed a significant collaboration with key stakeholders in Arkansas. This partnership involves the Arkansas Department of Human Services (DHS) and the Office of Substance Abuse and Mental Health (OSAMH). Together, they are working on implementing Family Centered initiatives.

data.title: Diodes Incorporated to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Diodes Incorporated (Nasdaq: DIOD) has scheduled a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 4:00 p.m. Central Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Present will be Gary Yu, President and CEO, Brett Whitmire, CFO, and Emily Yang, Senior VP of Worldwide Sales and Marketing. The official report for the first quarter 2026 will be released during the call.

data.title: Appeal by Kalshi could take prediction markets dispute to Supreme Court after hearing arguments from both sides.
data.description: Following presentations from Kalshi and legal representatives for Nevada, an appellate court is anticipated to make a decision soon.

data.title: HIVE aims to raise $75M for AI infrastructure, boosting GPU capacity & data centers to grow high-performance computing.
data.description: The funds generated by the Bitcoin miner will be utilized to increase GPU capacity and expand data centers, as it enhances its high-performance computing operations beyond just mining.

data.title: Nelnet Campus Commerce to Be Featured on Now We Know! with Steve Guttenberg - Airing April 18 on CNBC
data.description: In Notre Dame, Indiana, a new episode of Now We Know! with Steve Guttenberg is set to air on April 18 at 11am ET on CNBC. The episode will showcase Nelnet Campus Commerce, a subsidiary of Nelnet Inc. (NYSE: NNI), which specializes in offering financial services and technology solutions aimed at enhancing...

data.title: Farrell Fritz, P.C. Provides Notice Following Data Security Event
data.description: In Uniondale, New York on April 16, 2026, Farrell Fritz, P.C. announced a data security incident affecting personal information of some past and present patients. The event was discovered after a network disruption on July 18. The total number of individuals impacted is unclear yet.

data.title: Power Integrations to Webcast First-Quarter Earnings Conference Call on May 7
data.description: Power Integrations (Nasdaq: POWI) is set to announce its Q1 financial results on May 7, 2026, post-market hours. The company will conduct a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific time on the same day. To participate, interested individuals can access the live and archived audio webcast via the investor web page at https://investors.power.com. Those wishing to join via phone can register for the call by filling out an online form. More details about the event can be found on the company's webpage.

data.title: Century Aluminum Commences Expanded Production at Mt. Holly Smelter
data.description: Expansion project contributes to a significant increase in total production in the United States, with a growth of 10%.

data.title: Outcome of board member election at annual shareholder assembly - important figures disclosed.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been revealed that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week. A total of 10,000 new cases were reported, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to 150,000. Additionally, there have been 500 new hospitalizations, with a total of 5,000 people currently being treated in hospitals. The surge in cases has prompted authorities to implement stricter measures to control the spread of the virus. The situation is being closely monitored, and health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: IDACORP, Inc. Declares Dividend
data.description: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) announced a common stock dividend of $0.88 per share, to be paid out on June 1, 2026. Shareholders as of May 5, 2026, will be eligible to receive the dividend.

data.title: Congressional and Defense Leaders Visit ThayerMahan in Response to Growing Global Maritime Security Challenges
data.description: On April 10th, 2026, in Groton, Connecticut, Congresswoman Rosa DeLauro (CT-03), Congressman Joe Courtney (CT-02), Minority Clerk of the House Defense Appropriation Subcommittee Jennifer Chartrand, and senior U.S. Navy officials paid a visit to ThayerMahan. This visit aimed to collaborate with the company and discuss matters related to defense. The presence of prominent figures highlighted the importance of the meeting.

data.title: GitLab Extends Agentic AI with New Automated Security Remediation, Pipeline Setup, and Delivery Analytics
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. announced the release of GitLab 18.11, introducing agentic AI capabilities throughout the software lifecycle. The new update includes enhancements in security remediation, pipeline configuration, and delivery analytics. The company aims to address the challenges presented by the increasing speed of AI-generated code outpacing the pace of delivery, security, and operations. This phenomenon, known as the AI Paradox, results in faster code production compared to the supporting systems. As the volume of code expands, so does the backlog, highlighting the need for improved orchestration and automation in DevSecOps.

data.title: Sanuwave Health's Q1 2026 revenue jumps 3-4% YoY to $9.6-$9.7M.
data.description: In the latest report, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, marking a decline of 0.2% from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals stands at 7.5 million, with the job market showing signs of improvement. Additionally, the report highlighted an increase in job openings by 200,000, reflecting a positive trend in the labor sector. Furthermore, the average hourly wage saw an uptick of 2.5%, providing some relief to workers amidst economic uncertainties. Overall, the data portrays a mixed picture of the economy with both positive and concerning indicators.

data.title: Premier American Uranium Announces CFO Transition
data.description: In Toronto on April 16, 2026, Premier American Uranium Inc. (PUR), listed on TSXV as PUR and on OTCQB as PAUIF, has disclosed that Greg Duras has stepped down from his role as Chief Financial Officer of the company. This change is effective immediately.

data.title: Notice of First Quarter Results Conference Call and Softwood Lumber Duties and Operational Update
data.description: Vancouver-based West Fraser Timber Co. Ltd. (TSX and NYSE: WFG) has announced an upcoming analysts' conference call on April 30, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. PT to reveal their first quarter financial and operating results for 2026. This event will provide insights into the company's performance in Q1 and will be open for discussion and analysis by interested parties.

data.title: Post Holdings Schedules Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Conference Call
data.description: A major consumer packaged goods holding company based in St. Louis, Post Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: POST), has shared news of an upcoming conference call scheduled for May 8, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. This call aims to delve into the financial outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026. It signifies a key event for investors and stakeholders interested in the company's performance during this critical period.
Israel launched airstrikes on southern Lebanon minutes before ceasefire - Asharq Correspondent.

data.title: ENERGY FUELS RELEASES 2025 SUSTAINABILITY REPORT
data.description: Today, Energy Fuels Inc., a prominent U.S. company in uranium, rare earth elements, and critical materials production, revealed its 2025 Sustainability Report. Trading under NYSE American: UUUU and TSX: EFR, the company's announcement showcases its commitment to sustainability and transparency.

data.title: International Battery Metals Secures Fourth Follow-On Investment From EV Metals VII, LLC, Adding USD $2.8 Million Under Existing LOI
data.description: International Battery Metals Ltd., a tech company specializing in modular direct lithium extraction systems, revealed a non-brokered private placement financing. This marks the fourth investment under a binding Letter of Intent from February 28, 2025, allowing for up to $15.0 million. The funding comes from EV Metals VII LLC.
